visibilityRule.booleanFilter: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8

valueListItems.value: OPPORTUNITY.STAGE_NAME|NOT_EQUAL|["Closed - Won","Closed - Lost","Lost Opportunity","Lost","Won","Won - Solution Launched","Asset Fully Retained","Won- Selected/ Upgraded","Full Asset Exit","Partial Asset Exit"]

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: YTD Net Flows by Asset Class

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: AUM by Asset Class - Last day of last month

valueListItems.value: OPPORTUNITY.STAGE_NAME|NOT_EQUAL|["Closed - Won","Won","Lost","Won Opportunity","Lost Opportunity","Closed - Lost","Internally Closed"]
